programs.name: CampTO Plus: Sports
programs.description: Calling all sports fans! In this camp you will have the opportunity to learn the fundamentals of play in a variety of sports. Through drills, practice and games, enhance your skills and have some fun. In addition to the minimum two hours a day focusing on developing and fine-tuning your sport skills, you will also enjoy games, arts, sports and swim days dependent on weather and camp location. A trip or on-site special experience will be included, such as themed events, clinics or workshops to further enhance the camp.

programs.name: A Journey from Acrylics to Oils
programs.description: This introductory–intermediate course is for beginners and experienced painters who want to explore oil painting using water-mixable oils. Often seen as intimidating or toxic, oil painting becomes safe and accessible in this class. Students will learn layering, glazing, and composition while building confidence and personal expression.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Through painting, drawing, and sketching, discover how  colour, shape and composition can capture the spirit and emotion of a place  rather than its literal form. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

programs.name: Adapted Active8
programs.description: With a variety of activities to enjoy, Active8 will keep you moving. Join us for co-operative games, arts, sports, basic cooking, swimming, physical activity workshops, community walks and more.Participants must have a current AIS membership. To register, contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.

programs.name: CampTO Plus: Sports
programs.description: Calling all sports fans! In this camp you will have the opportunity to learn the fundamentals of play in a variety of sports. Through drills, practice and games, enhance your skills and have some fun. In addition to the minimum two hours a day focusing on developing and fine-tuning your sport skills, you will also enjoy games, arts, sports and swim days dependent on weather and camp location. A trip or on-site special experience will be included, such as themed events, clinics or workshops to further enhance the camp.

In addition to the minimum two hours a day focusing on developing and fine-tuning your sport skills, you will also enjoy games, arts, sports and swim days dependent on weather and camp location. A trip or on-site special experience will be included, such as themed events, clinics or workshops to further enhance the camp.

programs.name: A Journey from Acrylics to Oils
programs.description: This introductory–intermediate course is for beginners and experienced painters who want to explore oil painting using water-mixable oils. Often seen as intimidating or toxic, oil painting becomes safe and accessible in this class. Students will learn layering, glazing, and composition while building confidence and personal expression.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Through painting, drawing, and sketching, discover how  colour, shape and composition can capture the spirit and emotion of a place  rather than its literal form. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

programs.name: Adapted Active8
programs.description: With a variety of activities to enjoy, Active8 will keep you moving. Join us for co-operative games, arts, sports, basic cooking, swimming, physical activity workshops, community walks and more.Participants must have a current AIS membership. To register, contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.

programs.name: CampTO Plus: Sports
programs.description: Calling all sports fans! In this camp you will have the opportunity to learn the fundamentals of play in a variety of sports. Through drills, practice and games, enhance your skills and have some fun.In addition to the minimum two hours a day focusing on developing and fine-tuning your sport skills, you will also enjoy games, arts, sports and swim days dependent on weather and camp location. A trip or on-site special experience will be included, such as themed events, clinics or workshops to further enhance the camp.

programs.name: A Journey from Acrylics to Oils
programs.description: This introductory–intermediate course is for beginners and experienced painters who want to explore oil painting using water-mixable oils. Often seen as intimidating or toxic, oil painting becomes safe and accessible in this class. Students will learn layering, glazing, and composition while building confidence and personal expression.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Through painting, drawing, and sketching, discover how  colour, shape and composition can capture the spirit and emotion of a place  rather than its literal form. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

programs.name: CampTO Plus: Sports
programs.description: Calling all sports fans! In this camp you will have the opportunity to learn the fundamentals of play in a variety of sports. Through drills, practice and games, enhance your skills and have some fun.In addition to the minimum two hours a day focusing on developing and fine-tuning your sport skills, you will also enjoy games, arts, sports and swim days dependent on weather and camp location. A trip or on-site special experience will be included, such as themed events, clinics or workshops to further enhance the camp.

In addition to the minimum two hours a day focusing on developing and fine-tuning your sport skills, you will also enjoy games, arts, sports and swim days dependent on weather and camp location. A trip or onsite special experience will be included, such as themed events, clinics or workshops to further enhance the camp.

programs.name: A Journey from Acrylics to Oils
programs.description: This introductory–intermediate course is for beginners and experienced painters who want to explore oil painting using water-mixable oils. Often seen as intimidating or toxic, oil painting becomes safe and accessible in this class. Students will learn layering, glazing, and composition while building confidence and personal expression.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Through painting, drawing, and sketching, discover how  colour, shape and composition can capture the spirit and emotion of a place  rather than its literal form. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

programs.name: Adapted Active8
programs.description: With a variety of activities to enjoy, Active8 will keep you moving. Join us for co-operative games, arts, sports, basic cooking, swimming, physical activity workshops, community walks and more.Participants must have a current AIS membership. To register, contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.

programs.name: CampTO Plus: Sports
programs.description: Calling all sports fans! In this camp you will have the opportunity to learn the fundamentals of play in a variety of sports. Through drills, practice and games, enhance your skills and have some fun.In addition to the minimum two hours a day focusing on developing and fine-tuning your sport skills, you will also enjoy games, arts, sports and swim days dependent on weather and camp location. A trip or on-site special experience will be included, such as themed events, clinics or workshops to further enhance the camp.

programs.name: After-School Recreation Care (ARC)
programs.description: Are you seeking recreational care at the end of the school day? After School Recreation Care (ARC) offers outdoor play, crafts, sports, games and physical literacy. Participants will receive homework help, nutritional education and a snack while focusing on social interactions and wellness.

programs.name: A Journey from Acrylics to Oils
programs.description: This introductory–intermediate course is for beginners and experienced painters who want to explore oil painting using water-mixable oils. Often seen as intimidating or toxic, oil painting becomes safe and accessible in this class. Students will learn layering, glazing, and composition while building confidence and personal expression.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Through painting, drawing, and sketching, discover how  colour, shape and composition can capture the spirit and emotion of a place  rather than its literal form. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

programs.name: Adapted Active8
programs.description: With a variety of activities to enjoy, Active8 will keep you moving. Join us for co-operative games, arts, sports, basic cooking, swimming, physical activity workshops, community walks and more.Participants must have a current AIS membership. To register, contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.

A trip or on-site special experience will be included, such as themed events, clinics or workshops to further enhance the camp.

programs.name: A Journey from Acrylics to Oils
programs.description: This introductory–intermediate course is for beginners and experienced painters who want to explore oil painting using water-mixable oils. Often seen as intimidating or toxic, oil painting becomes safe and accessible in this class. Students will learn layering, glazing, and composition while building confidence and personal expression.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Through painting, drawing, and sketching, discover how  colour, shape and composition can capture the spirit and emotion of a place  rather than its literal form. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

programs.name: Adapted Active8
programs.description: With a variety of activities to enjoy, Active8 will keep you moving. Join us for co-operative games, arts, sports, basic cooking, swimming, physical activity workshops, community walks and more.Participants must have a current AIS membership. To register, contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.

programs.name: After-School Recreation Care (ARC)
programs.description: Are you seeking recreational care at the end of the school day? After School Recreation Care (ARC) offers outdoor play, crafts, sports, games and physical literacy. Participants will receive homework help, nutritional education and a snack while focusing on social interactions and wellness.

programs.name: CampTO Plus: Swim Ultra
programs.description: Enhance and develop your swim skills at camp.  Every day, you will take part in small group lessons for 30 minutes at a City of Toronto pool.  In addition to focusing on developing and fine-tuning your swim skills, you will also enjoy games, arts and sports. A trip or on-site special experience will be included, such as themed events, clinics or workshops to further enhance the camp.

Through drills, practice and games, enhance your skills and have some fun. In addition to the minimum two hours a day focusing on developing and fine-tuning your sport skills, you will also enjoy games, arts, sports and swim days dependent on weather and camp location. A trip or onsite special experience will be included, such as themed events, clinics or workshops to further enhance the camp.

programs.name: CampTO Plus: Swim Ultra
programs.description: Enhance and develop your swim skills at camp.  Every day, you will take part in small group lessons for 30 minutes at a City of Toronto pool.  In addition to focusing on developing and fine-tuning your swim skills, you will also enjoy games, arts and sports. A trip or on-site special experience will be included, such as themed events, clinics or workshops to further enhance the camp.

programs.name: CampTO Plus: Sports
programs.description: Calling all sports fans! In this camp you will have the opportunity to learn the fundamentals of play in a variety of sports. Through drills, practice and games, enhance your skills and have some fun.In addition to the minimum two hours a day focusing on developing and fine-tuning your sport skills, you will also enjoy games, arts, sports and swim days dependent on weather and camp location. A trip or on-site special experience will be included, such as themed events, clinics or workshops to further enhance the camp.

programs.name: CampTO Plus: Swim Ultra
programs.description: Enhance and develop your swim skills at camp.  Every day, you will take part in small group lessons for 30 minutes at a City of Toronto pool.  In addition to focusing on developing and fine-tuning your swim skills, you will also enjoy games, arts and sports. A trip or on-site special experience will be included, such as themed events, clinics or workshops to further enhance the camp.

A trip or on-site special experience will be included, such as themed events, clinics or workshops to further enhance the camp.
programs.location: Joseph J. Piccininni Cmty Rec Centre

programs.description: Calling all tennis fans! programs.name: Ultra Swim 2
programs.description: Jump into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front swim, back kicks and glides. Learn how to stay afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Work towards a continuous swim of five metres. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 1 or Preschool Swim  3.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 2
programs.description: Jump into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front swim, back kicks and glides. Learn how to stay afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Work towards a continuous swim of five metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 1 or Preschool Swim  3.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 2 - Small Group
programs.description: Jump into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front swim, back kicks and glides. Learn how to stay afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Work towards a continuous swim of five metres. Class size is limited to four participants.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 1 or Preschool Swim  3.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 2 - Small Group
programs.description: Jump into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front swim, back kicks and glides. Learn how to stay afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Work towards a continuous swim of five metres. Class size is limited to four participants.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 1 or Preschool Swim  3.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 3
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop staying afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Learn front crawl, diving and back swim. Work towards a continuous swim of 10 meters. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 2 or Preschool Swim 4.

programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front crawl and treading water. Learn side breathing, somersault, whip-kick and forward roll. Work towards a continuous swim of 25 metres. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 3.

A trip or on-site special experience will be included, such as themed events, clinics or workshops to further enhance the camp.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 2
programs.description: Jump into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front swim, back kicks and glides. Learn how to stay afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Work towards a continuous swim of five metres. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 1 or Preschool Swim  3.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 2
programs.description: Jump into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front swim, back kicks and glides. Learn how to stay afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Work towards a continuous swim of five metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 1 or Preschool Swim  3.

programs.description: Jump into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front swim, back kicks and glides. Learn how to stay afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. programs.name: Ultra Swim 2 - Small Group
programs.description: Jump into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front swim, back kicks and glides. Learn how to stay afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Work towards a continuous swim of five metres. Class size is limited to four participants.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 1 or Preschool Swim  3.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 2 - Small Group
programs.description: Jump into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front swim, back kicks and glides. Learn how to stay afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Work towards a continuous swim of five metres. Class size is limited to four participants.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 1 or Preschool Swim  3.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 3
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop staying afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Learn front crawl, diving and back swim. Work towards a continuous swim of 10 meters. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 2 or Preschool Swim 4.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 4
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front crawl and treading water. Learn side breathing, somersault, whip-kick and forward roll. Work towards a continuous swim of 25 metres. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 3.

You will explore a wide variety of art mediums and learn the secrets of painting, sketching, drawing and more.In addition to the minimum two hours a day focusing on developing and fine-tuning your artist skills, you will also enjoy games, arts, sports and swim days dependent on weather and camp location. A trip or on-site special experience will be included, such as themed events, clinics or workshops to further enhance the camp.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 2
programs.description: Jump into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front swim, back kicks and glides. Learn how to stay afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Work towards a continuous swim of five metres. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 1 or Preschool Swim  3.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 3
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop staying afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Learn front crawl, diving and back swim. Work towards a continuous swim of 10 meters. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 2 or Preschool Swim 4.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 4
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front crawl and treading water. Learn side breathing, somersault, whip-kick and forward roll. Work towards a continuous swim of 25 metres. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 3.
